Class Album

  • java.lang.Object
    • Album
  • public class Album
extends java.lang.Object
    represents the album of a music artist

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Album​(java.lang.String title, java.lang.String genre, int year, int trackCount)
      Constructs a new album.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.String displayInfo()
      displays a summary of the album
      java.lang.String getGenre()
      get the genre of the album
      int getSongsListened()
      get the number of songs the user has listened to
      java.lang.String getTitle()
      get the title of the album
      int getTrackCount()
      get the track count of the album
      int getYear()
      get the year when the album released
      boolean isCompleted()
      checks whether an album is completed, meaning songs listened is equal to the track count
      void setGenre​(java.lang.String genre)
      change the genre of the album
      void setSongsListened​(int songsListened)
      set the number of songs the user has listened to.
      void setTitle​(java.lang.String title)
      change the title of the album
      void setTrackCount​(int trackCount)
      set the total number of tracks in the album
      void setYear​(int year)
      change the year of the album

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Album

        public Album​(java.lang.String title,
             java.lang.String genre,
             int year,
             int trackCount)
        Constructs a new album. songsListened is initialized to 0
        Parameters:
        title - title of the album
        genre - genre of the album
        year - year when album is released
        trackCount - number of track count in the album

    • Method Detail

      • getTitle

        public java.lang.String getTitle()
        get the title of the album
        Returns:
        the title of the album

      • setTitle

        public void setTitle​(java.lang.String title)
        change the title of the album
        Parameters:
        title - is the new title of the album

      • getGenre

        public java.lang.String getGenre()
        get the genre of the album
        Returns:
        the genre of the album

      • setGenre

        public void setGenre​(java.lang.String genre)
        change the genre of the album
        Parameters:
        genre - is the new genre of the album

      • getYear

        public int getYear()
        get the year when the album released
        Returns:
        album release year

      • setYear

        public void setYear​(int year)
        change the year of the album
        Parameters:
        year - is the new album release year

      • getTrackCount

        public int getTrackCount()
        get the track count of the album
        Returns:
        the track count

      • setTrackCount

        public void setTrackCount​(int trackCount)
        set the total number of tracks in the album
        Parameters:
        trackCount - the new track count

      • getSongsListened

        public int getSongsListened()
        get the number of songs the user has listened to
        Returns:
        the number of songs listened to

      • setSongsListened

        public void setSongsListened​(int songsListened)
        set the number of songs the user has listened to. prints an error message if input is out of range
        Parameters:
        songsListened - number of songs listened to

      • isCompleted

        public boolean isCompleted()
        checks whether an album is completed, meaning songs listened is equal to the track count
        Returns:
        true when songs listened is equal to track count, false otherwise

      • displayInfo

        public java.lang.String displayInfo()
        displays a summary of the album
        Returns:
        a string of the summary
